name: nextcloud-aio
title: Nextcloud All-in-One
description: Full-featured Nextcloud deployment with automatic updates, built-in Collabora Office, Talk, backups, and GPU acceleration. Manages its own containers via the AIO mastercontainer.

variables.name: PORT_NEXTCLOUD_AIO
variables.label: AIO Installer Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Nextcloud AIO web installer interface

variables.name: APACHE_IP_BINDING
variables.label: Apache IP Binding
variables.description: IP address Apache will bind to (use your server's LAN IP for reverse proxy setups)

variables.name: NEXTCLOUD_DATADIR
variables.label: Data Directory
variables.description: Host path where Nextcloud stores user files. Must be an absolute path on the host.

variables.name: NEXTCLOUD_MEMORY_LIMIT
variables.label: PHP Memory Limit
variables.description: Maximum memory allocation for PHP processes

variables.name: NEXTCLOUD_STARTUP_APPS
variables.label: Startup Apps
variables.description: Space-separated list of Nextcloud apps to install on first start
variables.default: deck twofactor_totp tasks calendar contacts notes

variables.name: TALK_PORT
variables.label: Talk Port
variables.description: UDP port for Nextcloud Talk (video/audio calls)
